text: I want my money back but I didn't actually buy anything. Should I get a refund or what?
I can't access my account since the last update, and the reset link isn't working.
Hey, I ordered a jacket last week and it still hasn't arrived. What is going on? I thought fast shipping was promised? So frustrating!

I'm really not sure how this happened, but I've been charged for an item that I thought I had returned last week. I followed all the steps for the return process, and I distinctly remember seeing the confirmation email about it. Can you please look into this for me? It's frustrating because I was expecting my refund to be processed by now, but instead, I see this charge. I'm just confused, and I need to understand what's going on with my account and why this is happening. Thanks in advance for your help!
Could you please clarify the procedures for submitting a request for an account verification? I want to ensure I follow the correct steps.

I would like to express my dissatisfaction regarding the recent service I received. There were several issues that were not adequately addressed, which has led to my frustration. However, I find it difficult to pinpoint specific details at the moment.
I’m really upset! I bought this product and it totally didn’t work as promised. It’s just so unfair because I expected something great!
Dear Customer Support, I would like to request a refund for my order, but I was also informed that I didn't place an order. Can you clarify and help me with this?
Hey, quick question about my order. Is there a way to change the shipping address after it’s been placed? Thanks!
Could you please clarify the process for updating my billing information? I want to ensure everything is correct.
I am encountering issues with the application. It frequently crashes during use, which is quite frustrating. Could you please assist me in resolving this?
Hey there! I just found out that I can't log into my account since I switched my phone. It seems like my 2FA settings got messed up. Can you help me get back in?
I am experiencing some difficulties with my account access, but I'm not quite sure what the exact problem is. Could you please assist me in resolving this issue?
Hey, whenever I try to upload my profile pic, it just says error. Can you help?
My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. Pls help!
Could you please clarify the process for updating my account information? I want to ensure that everything is accurate.
I would like to request a refund for my recent purchase, but I mistakenly received the correct item. However, I still believe I deserve a refund due to the delay in shipping.
I need a refund for my last order. It arrived damaged and I can't use it.
I need a refund. Paid a lot for this and it’s not working, plus my dog keeps barking at it, so annoying.

I have to say that my experience with your service has been incredibly disappointing, and I'm really quite upset about how things have turned out. First, I was promised a delivery date that was crucial for my plans, but it came two weeks late, and that totally messed everything up. Then, when I tried to contact support, I felt like I was just speaking to a robot. I don't want to go into every single detail, but it felt like no one was listening to my concerns at all, and I had to repeat myself several times, which just added to my frustration. I really hope you can improve this situation moving forward because I would hate to feel this disappointed again. It’s just so annoying to deal with this when I could have chosen a different provider. Please take my concerns seriously.
I filed a complaint about my order being late, but I received an email saying my order was on time. This doesn't make sense and I would like a resolution.
My app crashes but also works? Help!
I can't access my account even after resetting my password. This has never happened before.
hey, so like, do u think there will ever be an option to self-host the app? or is it always just gonna be cloud stuff? asking for a friend 🤔
